system.powerDescription:
Choose a human or exorcist within range and then apply one of the following effects to them as you contort the essence of human connection. 

• Worship: The attention of every creature within range becomes fixated on the target. It is difficult to wrest the gaze away. 

• Shun: Focusing on the target becomes near-impossible and as soon as they leave line of sight their presence will be difficult to remember. 

If you attempt to influence a supernatural creature with this roll PSYCHE to determine success. Gain or grant +1D when next you or an ally take advantage of this power.
